nodes.itemHTML: • AForge.NET - Open source C# framework for developers and researchers in the fields of Computer Vision and Artificial Intelligence. Development has now shifted to GitHub.

• Accord.NET - Together with AForge.NET, this library can provide image processing and computer vision algorithms to Windows, Windows RT and Windows Phone. Some components are also available for Java and Android.
• ahk-libsstars138 - Ryan Shipp's collection of libraries.
• I want to use

• ElectricacCelerator Continuous Delivery isn’t continuous if builds and tests take too long to complete. ElectricAccelerator speeds up builds and tests by up to 20X, improving software time to market, infrastructure utilization and developer productivity
• Rack::Trackerstars625 - Rack middleware that can be hooked up to multiple services and exposing them in a unified fashion.
• blacksmithstars180 - Data generation framework for Elixir.
• rulexstars12 - Simple rule handler using Elixir pattern matching.
• loomstars216 - A CRDT library with δ-CRDT support.
• feederstars43 - Parse RSS and Atom feeds.
• factory_girl_elixirstars42 - Minimal implementation of Ruby's factory_girl in Elixir.
• datomexstars43 - Elixir driver for the Datomic REST API.
• simetricstars59 - String similarity metrics for Elixir.
• eflamestars402 - Flame Graph profiler for Erlang.
• AvalonEditstars1.5k - The WPF-based text editor component used in SharpDevelop
• python-frogstars44 - Python binding to Frog, an NLP suite for Dutch. (pos tagging, lemmatisation, dependency parsing, NER)
• python-timblstars16 - A Python extension module wrapping the full TiMBL C++ programming interface. Timbl is an elaborate k-Nearest Neighbours machine learning toolkit.
• docker Docker - An open platform for distributed applications for developers and sysadmins
• Dojangostars63 - Dojo and Django Python framework integration
• flywaydb Database Migrations Made Easy
• Jenkinsdeployplugin deploy to tomcat
• awesome-shell
• coverity Continually measure and improve code quality and security across your development organization

• fxcop FxCop is an application that analyzes managed code assemblies (code that targets the .NET Framework common language runtime) and reports information about the assemblies, such as possible design, localization, performance, and security improvements
• cpd Duplicate code can be hard to find, especially in a large project. But PMD's Copy/Paste Detector (CPD) can find it for you
• checkstyle Checkstyle is a development tool to help programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard
• continuousIntegration
• continuousdelivery
• devopsdays
• Jenkins An extendable open source continuous integration server
• circleci Continuous Integration for web apps.
• testling Automatic browser tests on every push
• magnum-ci Hosted Continuous Integration and Delivery Platform for private repositories
• wercker Test and deploy your applications with ease
• GridWiki wiki page for Grid
• UGE Univa workload management solutions maximize the value of existing computing resources by efficiently sharing workloads across thousands of servers
• vmwarevshpere VMware vSphere (formerly VMware Infrastructure 4) is VMware's cloud computing virtualization operating system
• [miscrosofthyperv](Docker - An open platform for distributed applications for developers and sysadmins) microsoft virtualization
• git Git is a free and open source distributed version control system designed to handle everything from small to very large projects with speed and efficiency
• clearcase IBM Rational ClearCase is a software configuration management solution that provides version control, workspace management, parallel development support, and build auditing
• svn Subversion is an open source version control system

• teamfoundationservice Visual Studio Online, based on the capabilities of Team Foundation Server with additional cloud services, is the online home for your development projects. Get up and running in minutes on our cloud infrastructure without having to install or configure a single server. Visual Studio Online connects to Visual Studio, Eclipse, Xcode, and other Git clients to support development for a variety of platforms and languages

• scons SCons is an Open Source software construction tool—that is, a next-generation build tool. Think of SCons as an improved, cross-platform substitute for the classic Make utility with integrated functionality similar to autoconf/automake and compiler caches such as ccache. In short, SCons is an easier, more reliable and faster way to build software

• msbuild The Microsoft Build Engine is a platform for building applications. This engine, which is also known as MSBuild, provides an XML schema for a project file that controls how the build platform processes and builds software. Visual Studio uses MSBuild, but it doesn't depend on Visual Studio. By invoking msbuild.exe on your project or solution file, you can orchestrate and build products in environments where Visual Studio isn't installed
• ant Ant can be used to pilot any type of process which can be described in terms of targets and tasks. The main known usage of Ant is the build of Java applications.

• maven Apache Maven is a software project management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model (POM), Maven can manage a project's build, reporting and documentation from a central piece of information.
• nginx A high performance free open source web server powering busiest sites on the Internet
• tomcat An open source software implementation of the Java Servlet and JavaServer Pages technologies
• infoq
• stackoverflow
• devops submit

• Import
    • ActiveRecord Importstars3.8k - a library for bulk inserting data using ActiveRecord.
    • bulk_insertstars823 - A little ActiveRecord extension for helping to insert lots of rows in a single insert statement.
    • data_minerstars299 - Download, pull out of a ZIP/TAR/GZ/BZ2 archive, parse, correct, and import XLS, ODS, XML, CSV, HTML, etc. into your ActiveRecord models.
    • ferrystars245 - A ruby gem for easy data transfer.
• FiniteMachinestars794 - A plain Ruby state machine with a straightforward and expressive syntax.

• Misc
    • arel_extensionsstars134 - Extending Arel: more "rubyish" syntax, functions for strings, dates, math... and add native extensions for some DBs.
    • ActiveRecord::Turntablestars211 - A database sharding extension for ActiveRecord.
    • ActiveValidatorsstars302 - An exhaustive collection of off-the-shelf and tested ActiveModel/ActiveRecord validations.
    • DeepPluckstars406 - Allow you to pluck attributes from nested associations without loading a bunch of records.
    • Enumerizestars1.7k - Enumerated attributes with I18n and ActiveRecord/Mongoid/MongoMapper support.
    • Goldiloaderstars1.2k - Automatic ActiveRecord eager loading.
    • Ratingstars51 - A true Bayesian rating system with scope and cache enabled.

• Sorting
    • ActsAsListstars1.9k - Provides the capabilities for sorting and reordering a number of objects in a list.
    • ranked-modelstars1k - A modern row sorting library for ActiveRecord. It uses ARel aggressively and is better optimized than most other libraries.
• Mongoid Searchstars314 - Simple full text search implementation for Mongoid.
• SearchCopstars772 - Extends your ActiveRecord models to support fulltext search engine like queries via simple query strings and hash-based queries.

• textacularstars880 - Exposes full text search capabilities from PostgreSQL, and allows you to declare full text indexes. Textacular extends ActiveRecord with named_scope methods making searching easy and fun!
• FlyPie pluginstars35 - Abstract filesystem access using Flysystem.
• Annotatestars4k - Add a comment documenting the current schema to the top or bottom of each of your ActiveRecord models.

• Social
    • Meritstars1.5k - Adds reputation behavior to Rails apps in the form of Badges, Points, and Rankings for ActiveRecord or Mongoid.
    • PublicActivitystars2.9k - Provides easy activity tracking for your ActiveRecord, Mongoid 3 and MongoMapper models in Rails 3 and 4. Similar to Github's Public Activity.
    • Simple Feedstars314 - Fast and highly scalable read-optimized social activity feed library in pure Ruby, backed by Redis.
    • Unreadstars673 - Manage read/unread status of ActiveRecord objects - and it's fast.

• Tree
    • ActsAsTreestars563 - Extends ActiveRecord to add simple support for organizing items into parent–children relationships.
    • Ancestrystars3.5k - Organise ActiveRecord model into a tree structure using a variation on the materialised path pattern.
    • Awesome Nested Setstars2.3k - Awesome Nested Set is an implementation of the nested set pattern for ActiveRecord models.
    • Closure Treestars1.7k - Easily and efficiently make your ActiveRecord models support hierarchies using a Closure Table.
    • Mongoid Treestars306 - A tree structure for Mongoid documents using the materialized path pattern.
• Pick/Basic: A Programmer's Guide - Jonathan E. Sisk
